title: U-Taste 33.9 cm Extra Long Silicone Slotted Spoon, 315℃ Heat Resistant Food Grade Kitchen Cooking Spoon, Nonstick Seamless Rubber Serving Spoon for Mixing Stirring Basting Scooping Draining (Black)
features: [Not just make it, we upgrade it.] We are a professional kitchenware producer who have been focus on customer experience. In order to offer better and eco-friendly kitchenware, U-Taste collects customer suggestions of all similar products on Amazon. And then upgrade the products based on the data of the bad evaluation with the aim to provide customers with better kitchenware products.

[315℃ Heat Resistant Food Grade Silicone] U-Taste rubber cooking spoon is made of high-quality food grade material. It is 315℃ high heat resistant, so no melting issues when handling daily cooking tasks. No odor, no risk of melting, color fading, deformation or any other problems like chipping off thanks to its premium BPA Free material and fine workmanship.

[Long Seamless Integrated Design] The dishwasher safe mixing spoon with solid integrated design makes no crevices to catch food particles or dishwater. No breaking issue as there is no joint places. Its size is great for most mixing, stirring, serving, basting needs. The handle is long enough for most large pots without being too big to use at the table. Long length keeps your hand far from the heat, yet can still fit in your drawer for easy storage and can be hung for easy access.

[Non-Scratch Silicone Tip Safe with Non-Stick Cookware] Using a kitchen silicon spoon is necessary so as to protect and not scratch the coating of non-stick pots and pans. These spoons come with a soft silicone tip. They are gentle on the stick-free surface to spare any damage to your fancy frypans or cookpots. If you are getting tired of the scratching sound by metal spoons, U-Taste mixing stirring kitchen spoon will be a good choice. The silicone handle provides a nice soft grip as well.

[Well Balance of Flexibility & Stiffness] U-Taste kitchen silicone serving spoon has a strong inner spine, providing plenty of stirring strength but no piercing issues. Firm enough to not sag or bend when you scoop something heavy even when stirring thick stews and chili, yet the head of the spoon still has flexible edges to scrape the sides, corners and edges.
description: Product Description Previous page Focus on Details Achieve Your Voice How U-Taste made a better slotted spoon? Food Grade Silicone 315℃ Heat Resistant No chipping, no peeling, no melting, no cracking issues. No Bending/Breaking Strong Inner Core Sturdy for breaking up ground beef or sausage. From 22cm to 25cm Extended Handle Length Work well in deep soup pots without burning your hand (Total length: 33.9cm) Scratch-Proof Tip Soft Silicone Head No risk of damaging nonstick pots and pans.
